hero.description: Managing Director of SPIE West Africa, President of the Franco Nigerian Chamber of Commerce and Industry, Author, Speaker, and International Business Leader.

items: Chevalier de l'Ordre National du Mérite

about.label: Biography
paragraphs: Guillaume Niarfeix is a distinguished French business executive whose career has been defined by transformative leadership at the intersection of energy, infrastructure, and international diplomacy. As Managing Director of SPIE West Africa, he leads one of the region's most strategically significant engineering and energy service operations.

His appointment as President of the Franco Nigerian Chamber of Commerce and Industry reflects his exceptional standing as a bridge between European expertise and African economic dynamism — championing bilateral trade, investment, and business collaboration at the highest levels.

Beyond his executive roles, Guillaume has established himself as a thought leader and author, publishing Electrochoc: Réarmer l'énergie — a compelling work addressing the critical challenges of energy transition and the strategic imperatives facing Africa and Europe in the 21st century.

cards.title: Managing Director
cards.desc: Leading one of West Africa's foremost engineering and energy service enterprises, driving operational excellence and strategic expansion across the region's most critical infrastructure sectors.

cards.title: President
cards.desc: Championing bilateral economic relations between France and Nigeria, facilitating trade, investment, and business diplomacy at the highest institutional level.

cards.title: Strategic Energy Leader
cards.desc: Over two decades of expertise in energy infrastructure, power generation, electrical engineering, and the strategic transition to sustainable energy systems across Africa.

cards.title: Author
cards.desc: Published thought leader addressing the geopolitics of energy, Africa's energy sovereignty, and the economic opportunities of the accelerated energy transition.

cards.title: International Speaker
cards.desc: Sought-after voice at international forums on energy transition, Africa-Europe business relations, infrastructure investment, and sustainable development leadership.

cards.title: Business Diplomat
cards.desc: A bridge between French enterprise expertise and African economic leadership, fostering institutional trust, policy dialogue, and long-term partnerships across two continents.

award.title: Knight of the National Order of Merit
award.subtitle: Knight of the National Order of Merit
award.label: Recognition · 2025
award.description: On November 21, 2025, Guillaume Niarfeix was awarded the prestigious Knight of the National Order of Merit by the French Republic  one of France's highest civilian honours.

book.description1: In Electrochoc: Réarmer l'énergie, Guillaume Niarfeix delivers a bold, unflinching strategic analysis of the global energy architecture.
